CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DANIEL L. SCHER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-14-2008 AT 6:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOUREDINI, BOMDAD BOBBY RUSSELL, MARIANGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES SCHER REVOCABLE TRUST HARNELL WADDLE CORP., DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS $1,283.00 PRINCIPAL, $229.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,512.00, THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS $783.00 DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S AFTER CREDIT FOR PREVIOUS PAYMENT BY THE DEFENDANTS; AND $500.00 - FOR PENALTIES PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1950.5. DEFENDANT DANIEL L. SCHER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
